clusters.title: Design spec documents a different log path than the implementation

member_findings.title: Design spec documents a different log path than the implementation
member_findings.impact: The spec says the command locates <log-dir>/<address>.log, while cli/logs.py resolves log_dir plus log_filename or process name with the .INFO.log suffix. Readers using the design as the maintenance reference will look for or preserve the wrong naming contract.
member_findings.fix: Update the design doc to describe the implemented log path resolution order and final <log_dir>/<log_filename-or-process-name>.INFO.log naming.
